A secret agent blocks a villain's helio-beam plot in the second of four Matt Helm movies.
programme.title: Murderers' Row

programme.desc: A doctor's unconventional theories of medicine and relationship with a young student place his reputation in jeopardy.
programme.title: People Will Talk

programme.desc: A brother (Fred Astaire) and sister (Jane Powell) take their act to 1947 London. Includes Astaire's famous dance on the ceiling.
programme.title: Royal Wedding

programme.desc: A doctor (Spencer Tracy) marries a model (Hedy Lamarr) and quits his clinic to make enough money to please her.
programme.title: I Take This Woman

programme.desc: A dried-out heroin addict (Frank Sinatra) returns to his wife (Eleanor Parker) and card dealing in Chicago.
programme.title: The Man With the Golden Arm

programme.desc: The new girlfriend in the architect's life finds foul play behind his bride's death and his own torment.
programme.title: The Second Woman

programme.desc: A carefree singing priest (Bing Crosby) clashes with a no-nonsense nun (Ingrid Bergman) at a school in a struggling parish.
programme.title: The Bells of St. Mary's

programme.desc: The jazz trombonist (James Stewart) marries his sweetheart (June Allyson), forms a band and creates his signature sound.
programme.title: The Glenn Miller Story

programme.desc: A goofy astronaut (Don Knotts) with a fear of heights becomes assistant janitor, then goes on a space mission.
programme.title: The Reluctant Astronaut

programme.desc: Two broke jazzmen (Bing Crosby, Bob Hope) hop a southbound ship and save a hypnotized heiress (Dorothy Lamour) from her sinister aunt.
programme.title: Road to Rio

programme.desc: A retired cat burglar (Cary Grant) sees fireworks with an American heiress (Grace Kelly) on the Riviera.
programme.title: To Catch a Thief

programme.desc: After returning to Hawaii from being in the army, a pineapple tycoon's rebellious son turns into an island tour guide with his girlfriend.
programme.title: Blue Hawaii

programme.desc: Rebel trucker "Rubber Duck" (Kris Kristofferson) blocks a crooked sheriff (Ernest Borgnine) with a CB-linked army of big rigs.
programme.title: Convoy

programme.desc: The pirate (Robert Newton) and young Jim Hawkins (Kit Taylor) rescue Purity Pinker (Connie Gilchrist) and look for treasure.
programme.title: Long John Silver

programme.desc: Willie (Anne Baxter), a German woman, joins an American carnival passing through Munich. While traveling town to town, she joins Frank in his high-dive act, but tragedy is only a slip away.
programme.title: Carnival Story

programme.desc: Defeated in battle and angry at his wife (Sylvia Lopez), the B.C. ruler (Edmund Purdom) of Judea goes roaring mad.
programme.title: Herod the Great

programme.desc: A psychiatrist (Vincent Price) and a nurse (Lynn Bari) treat a veteran's (Frank Latimore) wife who has seen them kill the psychiatrist's wife.
programme.title: Shock

programme.desc: An unpopular captain (Gregory Peck) leads his cavalry troops to a mountain pass, to hold it against Apaches.
programme.title: Only the Valiant

programme.desc: A Scotland Yard inspector (Byron Palmer) follows an actress (Constance Smith) to her fellow lodger, Jack the Ripper (Jack Palance).
programme.title: Man in the Attic

programme.desc: A barmaid, a Bostonian and an Indian (Rita Gam) flirt with an artist (Scott Brady) in 18th-century upstate New York.
programme.title: Mohawk

programme.desc: Newlyweds (Lucille Ball, Desi Arnaz) splurge on a trailer for their honeymoon, which includes Yosemite National Park.
programme.title: The Long, Long Trailer

programme.desc: Irish sheep herders (Deborah Kerr, Robert Mitchum) roam with their son and helper (Peter Ustinov), making a living in the 1920s Australia.
programme.title: The Sundowners

programme.title: Breakthrough with Rod Parsley
programme.desc: Breakthrough is the worldwide soul-winning media ministry of Rod Parsley, advancing the kingdom of God around the world through the eye of the camera. Multiplied millions are being challenged to become redemptive agents of change for kingdom advancement in their communities and homes. With practical teaching helping to grow strong Christians, Breakthrough with Rod Parsley makes a significant impact by boldly proclaiming the authority of Jesus Christ to save, heal and transform. Breakthrough with Rod Parsley is committed to reaching this generation with relevant truth to meet the challenges of the real world.

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: Manna Fest With Perry Stone
programme.desc: Manna-fest is the weekly television program of Perry Stone that deals with in-depth prophetic and practical studies of the Word of God. As biblical prophecy continues to unfold, you will find Manna-fest to be a resource to help you better understand where we are now in light of Bible prophecy and what the Bible says about the future. Be sure to tune in each week!

programme.title: The James Epperly Show
programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: Concepts of Faith
programme.desc: Arkansas farmer, Charles Capps and family discovered that the spiritual truths Jesustaught could be applied to the everyday circumstances of life and change it!The practical teaching of how to do that is needed and relevant for everyonetoday. Charles, wife Peggy and daughter Annette share life changing truths.

programme.title: Worldview Matters
programme.desc: David Fiorazo is an author, ordained pastor, truth proclaimer, media contributor, and podcaster. Since the1990’s David has been working in both TV and radio broadcasting and in Christian ministry. Join Jim and Lori as they bring to the stage today’s greatest prophets, health experts, and leaders of the Christian world to discuss and understand Biblical prophecy and the Revelations of Gods Word.

programme.title: World Impact With Dr. Billy Wilson

Twenty episodes are recorded yearly, both in the studio facilities and field locations around the world. For more information: WorldImpact.tv http://worldimpact.tv/

programme.title: VFI News
programme.desc: VFI News with Barry Segal brings you timely, insightful reports on Israel, the Middle East, andglobal events - analysed through a biblical and prophetic lens.

programme.title: Brian & Bobbie Houston - JesusFollowers.TV
programme.desc: "What greater honour and testimony is there than to be a devotedand passionate follower of the Lord Jesus Christ. Bobbie and I believe in the Church, thelocal church and the power and blessing of being planted (Psalm 92). We alsobelieve that in this day and age, God is creating multiple ways to water theseeds and greatness of calling within. Jesusfollowers.TV is here towelcome and extend our table of life and experience to you. This onlineplatform is here to love, encourage, and be a trustworthy voice of hope andinspiration in the days ahead. Our heart is to serve the God-given potentialwithin you and the Body of Christ. As Eph 2:21-22 says, we are all beingbuilt into a holy habitation for the Living God - brick by brick, stone bystone, with Jesus Christ as the Chief Cornerstone. May Jesusfollowers.TV be ablessing to you and those you care for” Brian and Bobbie Houston

programme.title: Paula Today with Paula White-Cain
programme.desc: Paula Today Paula White-Cain along with her husband, Jonathan Cain discuss real life situations and offer practical, Biblical solutions. Down-to-earth, refreshing, sometimes unfiltered and always sharing the life-changing love of Jesus thru Paula’s in-depth teaching or Jon’s anointed music. About Paula Paula White-Cain is the President of Paula White Ministries and City of Destiny headquartered in Apopka, Florida, and the spiritual advisor to President Donald Trump. She hosts Paula Today, a nationally syndicated daily broadcast reaching a potential audience of 5.7 billion people in over 200 countries. She is a leading Pastor, a renowned life coach, bestselling author, and highly sought-after motivational speaker. Paula’s commitment to humanity is felt worldwide as she reaches out through numerous charities and compassion ministries, fulfilling her mission and call to transform lives, heal hearts and win souls. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.title: Focus On The Family

Listen/Learn/Apply/ThriveInChrist!

programme.title: The Counter Culture Mom Show
programme.desc: Former Hollywood actress, pop culture expert, Tina Griffin, left her Wisconsin dairy farm at the age of 20 and headed to Hollywood, CA to earn a BA in Film and Television broadcasting from California State University - Los Angeles. She’s traveled globally for the past 20 years delivering her eye-opening show, Hollywood Exposed https://counterculturemom.com/adult-session/ , explaining the real agenda behind the entertainment industry and its impact on the foundational development of today’s youth. Besides being in countless movies, Tina has worked on TV shows such as Jimmy Kimmel Live!, Young and the Restless, Days of Our Lives, Lizzie McGuire, Drake and Josh, and Malcolm in the Middle, competed in the Miss America pageant and worked at the OSCARS. She was involved with the Film Society as well as Women in Film and an active member of the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) and the American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (AFTRA). She has opened for bands such as Colton Dixon, Third Day, and Jeremy Camp. programme.title: The Mondo Show
programme.desc: I am so excited to introduce to you a new show. I would be honored for you to be a part of this brand new and exciting project! My new show is called “Mondo”. It’s a new TV show coming to the PTL Television Network available on ROKU, Apple TV, and Amazon Fire. This show is real, it’s raw, with an organic feel to the conversation. Sometimes I will be talking directly to you the audience, and at other times I will place you in the middle of the conversation, so you can experience what is really being said. The subject matter for the conversation and the questions will be the things people are afraid to ask, even though it is what everyone is thinking. I want you to meet the men and women who are making a difference in our communities, in our culture, and in our lives. It’s a journey to understand the misunderstood. It’s The Mondo Show.

Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: The Jim Bakker Show
programme.desc: The Jim Bakker Show is an hour-long daily Christian broadcast that is aired throughout the United States, Canada, and the entire world through multiple broadcasts on Pioneer Network, Directv, Dish Network and other world wide satellites, and the PTL Television Network. Join Jim and Lori as they bring to the stage today’s greatest prophets, health experts, and leaders of the Christian world to discuss and understand Biblical prophecy and the Revelations of Gods Word.

programme.title: Kyle Winkler
programme.desc: Kyle Winkler is a practical Bible teacher, author of Silence Satan and Activating the Power of God’s Word, and creator of the popular Shut Up, Devil! app. Through his teachings, Kyle is known for using his own story to boast in the power of God’s Word for victorious living.

programme.title: Samuel Rodriguez
programme.desc: New Season with Pastor Sam will usher in a "New Season" where individuals and families will no longer live in failure or merely survive but they will thrive for the glory of Jesus.

programme.title: The James Epperly Show
programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: Christian Music Countdown
programme.desc: CMC is a TV showfeaturing contemporary Christian music videos. Each week we count down topmusic videos hand picked from our special guests.

programme.title: Concepts Of Faith with Charles Capps
programme.desc: ArkansasFarmer, Charles Capps and family discovered that the spiritual truths Jesustaught could be applied to the everyday circumstances of life and change it!The practical teaching of how to do that is needed and relevant for everyonetoday. Charles, wife Peggy and daughter Annette share life changing truths.
